kw.name: Launch App
kw.msg:
Keyword 'Launch App' failed: Code.E0102: Failed to create new Appium session due to: Message: Cannot start the 'com.google.android.contacts' application. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation. Original error: Cannot start the 'com.google.android.contacts' application. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation. Original error: Activity name '.com.android.contacts.activities.PeopleActivity' used to start the app doesn't exist or cannot be launched! Make sure it exists and is a launchable activity Stacktrace: UnknownError: Cannot start the 'com.google.android.contacts' application. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation. Original error: Cannot start the 'com.google.android.contacts' application. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation. Original error: Activity name '.com.android.contacts.activities.PeopleActivity' used to start the app doesn't exist or cannot be launched! Make sure it exists and is a launchable activity at getResponseForW3CError (C:\Usersoopa\AppData\Roaming
pm
ode_modules\appium
ode_modules\@appium ase-driver uild\lib\protocol\errors.js:850:36) at asyncHandler (C:\Usersoopa\AppData\Roaming
pm

ode_modules\@appium ase-driver uild\lib\protocol\protocol.js:476:77) The above error is caused by Error: Cannot start the 'com.google.android.contacts' application. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation. Original error: Cannot start the 'com.google.android.contacts' application. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation. Original error: Activity name '.com.android.contacts.activities.PeopleActivity' used to start the app doesn't exist or cannot be launched! Make sure it exists and is a launchable activity at ADB.startApp (C:\Usersoopa\.appium
ode_modules\appium-uiautomator2-driver
ode_modules\appium-adb uild\lib	ools\app-commands.js:611:15) at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:104:5) at async AndroidUiautomator2Driver.ensureAppStarts (C:\Usersoopa\.appium
ode_modules\appium-uiautomator2-driver uild\lib\driver.js:658:9) at async AndroidUiautomator2Driver.performSessionPostExecSetup (C:\Usersoopa\.appium
ode_modules\appium-uiautomator2-driver uild\lib\driver.js:513:13) at async AndroidUiautomator2Driver.startUiAutomator2Session (C:\Usersoopa\.appium

ode_modules\appium uild\lib\appium.js:272:44)
